candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Consider the following table of $K_{sp}$ values. In which of the following aqueous solutions would you expect $\text{AgCl}$ to have the lowest solubility?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
根据下列溶解离子积数据 $k_{sp}$ 值,在哪种水溶液中 $\text{AgCl}$ 的溶解度最低?

a) 0.020 M $\text{AgNO}_3$
b) 0.020 M $\text{BaCl}_2$
c) 纯水
d) 0.015 M $\text{NaCl}$
e) 0.020 M $\text{KCl}$
